headline: Why The TechnipFMC (FTI) Narrative Is Shifting With Subsea Growth And Richer Valuation Expectations
summary: The updated analyst fair value estimate for TechnipFMC has shifted from US$50.62 to US$62.62, putting a sharper spotlight on where expectations now sit. This change lines up with recent Street research that clusters around higher valuation targets, with some firms talking about the mid to high US$60s and low US$70s, while at least one large global bank is sounding more cautious after a strong share price move. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative may shape your view on the...

headline: Gemini Space Station Stock Crashed After Its IPO. Citi Thinks It Could Fall Even Further.
summary: The firm downgraded Gemini to Sell from Neutral and slashed its price target to $5.50 from $13 in a research note Wednesday.  The trading platform is years away from profitability, Citi argued, and it is struggling to compete in a depressed crypto market.  Founders and lead executives Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss picked an unlucky time for an initial public offering.

headline: How The United Rentals (URI) Story Is Shifting With New AI Tools And Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: Analysts recently nudged their fair value estimate for United Rentals slightly higher, from US$989.89 to US$991.39, highlighting a very modest reset in where models cluster. That small move sits against a mixed backdrop, with some firms lifting targets and others trimming them, as they rework assumptions and debate how much upside remains in the shares at current levels. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you track sentiment and research on United...
